Content on PAS tracker for final approvals

Nick continues drafting the Business Requirements Document (BRD)

streams.name: Solution 3 – Achieving Proficiency / Conditional & Provisional Workspace With Evidence Collection
streams.achieved:
Stakeholder engagements for feature codesign, desirability and feasibility testing has been successful with PAS team
Service Designers drafting feature list and concept posters to visualise Solution 3 and testing with stakeholders and TRG
streams.next:
Service Designers continue feature list and concept posters to start prioritisation and technical feasibility
Workshop planning for SLI and Curriculum stakeholder engagements

supportText:
Confirm go live approvals and CAB for Solution 1 aiming for 03/04 June 2026 technical release followed by communications Tuesday 9 June 2026 (to account for Kings Birthday Public Holiday)
Support required from PAS as currently only 1 nomination has confirmed and booked
